immediate.title: Registration open for Aerospace Test & Development Show 2026
immediate.summary: Registration for the Aerospace Test & Development Show 2026 at Hall 7, MEETT, Toulouse, is now open. The show takes place on 29–30 September 2026. The Aerospace Test & Development Show is the worlds leading and largest event 100% dedicated to aircraft, drone, helicopter, space and defence testing and development, and is organised by the publishers of Aerospace Testing International. This years edition will be the most comprehensive to date. With more than 150 exhibitors expected and over 70 speakers confirmed, the 2026 show will feature three free-to-attend forum stages: the Testing Forum, the Defence Testing Forum, and the Future Propulsion Forum — giving attendees more opportunities than e

immediate.title: How new FAA rules are opening the skies to personal eVTOLs
immediate.summary: Imagine operating a personal VTOL from your driveway and transitioning seamlessly into open skies. With the FAA’s Modernization of Special Airworthiness Certification ruling, the dream of taking off from your home, avoiding traffic and flying directly to your destination is a step closer to reality. The MOSAIC rule changes how VTOLs can be certified for personal use. The ruling, finalized in July last year, removes older maximum weight limits for Light Sport Aircraft (LSA) in favor of performance-based metrics, paving the way for owner-operated VTOLs. Continue reading How new FAA rules are opening the skies to personal eVTOLs at Aerospace Testing International.
